response.original_title: How to Get Money Out of Robinhood Wallet? (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: Withdrawing money from your Robinhood Wallet depends on whether you’re dealing with cash or crypto (: 1-863-338-2360) Robinhood offers simple steps to move funds to your bank or external wallet (: 1-863-338-2360) Make sure your account is verified and linked to a bank account first (: 1-863-338-2360) Withdraw Cash to Your Bank Account (: 1-863-338-2360) Open the Robinhood app and log in (: 1-863-338-2360) Tap on the Account icon (: 1-863-338-2360) Select Transfers or Transfer to Your Bank (: 1-863-338-2360) Enter the amount you want to withdraw (: 1-863-338-2360) Choose your linked bank account (: 1-863-338-2360) Confirm the withdrawal request (: 1-863-338-2360) Withdraw Crypto from Robinhood Wallet (: 1-863-338-2360) Go to the Robinhood app and open your crypto holdings (: 1-863-338-2360) Select the cryptocurrency you want to tr3-338-2360)
